'''âd-h-f-z''' ('''kadahfezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:codrive|codrive]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-h-f-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:codrive|codrive]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-h-f-z
|-
! Lemma
| kadahfezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidahfezoko|thidahfezoko]] || [[word:jidahfezoko|jidahfezoko]] || [[word:shidahfezoko|shidahfezoko]] || [[word:kidahfezoko|kidahfezoko]]
